strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, and React across multiple companies
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development from RIDE Capital
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
No demonstrated Kotlin experience; Java exposure is limited and dated (robotic arms at Altom 2016-2018)
No explicit Vitest experience, and cloud experience limited to AWS CDK with no GCP/Azure/Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective self-hosting
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with 13+ years of full-stack delivery, including recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and re:cinq, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP framework experience at re:cinq which maps to the 'AI agent development' requirement. Engineering rigor is well evidenced (TDD, CI/CD, pairing at RIDE; testing workshops; Fluent-Asserts library). MongoDB and AWS CDK are cited explicitly. Gaps: Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are not mentioned, and Java experience is dated — but these are learnable for a senior with this depth. Strong interview signal overall.
